entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum varieties used for genetic analysis

entities.name: ISOENZYME ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of enzymes to detect genetic polymorphism

entities.name: RFLP
entities.description: Restriction Fragment Length Polymorphism analysis used to detect genetic variation

entities.name: RAPD
entities.description: Randomly Amplified Polymorphic DNA analysis used to detect varietal differences

entities.name: ALANYL NAPHTHYLAMIDE AMINOPEPTIDASE
entities.description: An enzyme analyzed for polymorphism in chickpea

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: The occurrence of two or more clearly different morphs or alleles in the population of a species

entities.name: VARIETAL DIFFERENCES
entities.description: Differences observed between different varieties of the same crop

entities.name: GENOMIC VARIATIONS
entities.description: Differences in the DNA sequence among individuals or varieties

entities.name: PRIMERS
entities.description: Short sequences of nucleotides used to initiate DNA synthesis in RAPD analysis
